name: Scenario branches (12)
description: Twelve narrative routes across corrected topology. Four security, four observability, four platform.

routes.label: React2Shell — 9-stage attack (doc)
routes.description: Composite scenario: AI-assisted prompt chain + deserialization/RCE (React2Shell-class). Ingress through DMZ/FW/LB to AI chat, malicious payload crosses AI→backend trust boundary, IPS to Application Server (React SSR / RCE), XDR containment, Splunk ES correlation (RBA). Parallel edges cover AI Defense alerts, Nexus/NetFlow to ES, outbound C2 blocked at firewall, and SOAR.

attackSteps.title: Correlation layer — RBA
attackSteps.note: Correlates ADC, AI Defense, IPS, Nexus/NetFlow, firewall C2, and XDR alerts on the Application Server entity

routes.label: Phishing to lateral movement
routes.description: BEC / phishing email to endpoint compromise via stolen creds, lateral movement through campus to core assets.

routes.label: AI pipeline abuse
routes.description: Adversarial prompt or model abuse via AI services, detected by Cisco AI Defense, correlated in XDR.

routes.label: Compromised remote user
routes.description: Remote user device compromised post-MFA, SASE detects anomalous session patterns, XDR correlates across identity and endpoint.

routes.label: API / service latency chain
routes.description: End-user request through campus, API gateway, backend. OTEL traces latency, Splunk Observability alerts on SLO breach.

routes.label: Branch / SD-WAN degradation
routes.description: Branch office link degrades, SD-WAN reroutes, Secure Network Analytics flags anomaly, Observability shows impact.

routes.label: Cloud dependency failure
routes.description: SaaS provider outage cascades through multi-cloud compute into backend. Observability traces root cause via OTEL.

routes.label: Data center SLO breach
routes.description: On-prem data center resource exhaustion impacts core data and business systems. Federated search correlates across ES and Obs.

routes.label: Unified SIEM + XDR pipeline
routes.description: All security controls feed Cisco XDR (tier 1/2) which escalates to Splunk ES (tier 3). SOAR automates response. Talos enriches.

routes.label: Full-stack telemetry plane
routes.description: OTEL collectors across all app tiers feed Observability Cloud. Network Analytics + SD-WAN telemetry via fabric to ES.

routes.label: Zero-trust identity loop
routes.description: Duo MFA enforces at every access point. Identity verified against AD/IdP. SASE, Secure Endpoint, and XDR close the loop.

routes.label: SOAR automated containment
routes.description: Incident triggers SOAR playbook: isolate endpoint via Secure Endpoint, block at perimeter firewall, update XDR status.
